chapter_title.en: Chapter 29 – The Warranty and the Assignment

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/60)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/60)
text: أُتِيَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه ) بِرَجُلٍ تَكَفَّلَ بِنَفْسِ رَجُلٍ فَحَبَسَهُ فَقَالَ اطْلُبْ صَاحِبَكَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘They came to Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> with a man who had guaranteed in person for a man. So he<sup>asws</sup> imprisoned him, and said: ‘Seek out your companion (the one whom he had guaranteed to present)’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that once a man who had presented his person to bail out another man was brought before ‘Amir al-Mu’minin who placed him in custody and commanded him to present the man whom he had bailed out.’”
